basic_details.job_title: Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 35 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Gauhati High Court, which covers the states of Assam, Nagaland, Mizoram, and Arunachal Pradesh, is recruiting for the post of Stenographer Grade-II in the district courts of Assam. Below is a quick overview of the Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: The application fee for the Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 is as follows: | Note: Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances, and it will also not be held in reserve for any other examination or selection. Candidates are advised to apply online well before the last date to avoid heavy load on the internet or website.

age_limit.details: Category-wise age limits for the post, as on the last date of receipt of applications, are as follows:

qualification.details: Candidates must be citizens of India as defined under Article 5 and 6 of the Constitution of India, and must fulfil the following conditions to be eligible for the Stenographer Grade-II post.

vacancy_details.Pay Scale: Rs. 22,000 - Rs. 97,000 + GP Rs. 9,700/- plus other allowances as per rules

post_wise_breakdown.pay_scale: Rs. 22,000 - Rs. 97,000 + GP Rs. 9,700/- plus other allowances as per rules

category_wise_vacancy.Pay Scale: Rs. 22,000 - Rs. 97,000 + GP Rs. 9,700/- plus other allowances as per rules

salary_details.details: The selected candidates for the Stenographer Grade-II post will draw a pay scale of Rs. 22,000 - Rs. 97,000 plus Grade Pay of Rs. 9,700/-, along with other allowances applicable as per rules.

selection_process: Description Marks/Duration
Voice test before dictation 2 Minutes
Speed Test in shorthand at a speed of 100 words per minute (700 words) 100 Marks, Duration 7 minutes
Time given to candidates for testing the computer 3 Minutes
Time for transcription of the dictated portion in computer 25 Minutes
The selection process for the Stenographer Grade-II post consists of three stages: Stenography Test
Written Test
and Viva-voce.
Candidates equal to 10 times the number of vacancies (1:10 ratio)
who have qualified in the stenography test by securing a minimum of 30 marks
shall be called for the written test.

The written test will consist of objective type (OMR based) multiple choice questions. English Language Proficiency: 50 marks Official Language of the State of Assam (Assamese): 20 marks Total: 70 marks
duration 1½ hours Both English and Assamese language segments are of qualifying nature
and candidates must secure a minimum of 40% marks in each segment to qualify.
Candidates qualifying in the written test shall be called in the ratio of 1:3
in order of merit in the Stenography Test
for the Viva-voce (10 marks). The final merit position will be determined on the basis of the total marks obtained in the Stenography Test and Viva-voce.
Tie-Breaking Rule: In case of candidates obtaining equal marks (in the Stenography Test and Viva-voce)
the one who obtains more marks in the Stenography Test will be given preference. Where the marks obtained in the Stenography Test are also the same
the candidate senior in age will be given preference. The Gauhati High Court reserves the right to fix/alter the cut-off marks in the Written Test and Stenography Test.
how_to_apply: Before applying online, candidates must possess a valid e-mail ID and mobile number, which are mandatory for registration. Candidates are requested to note down the Registration Code, as the acknowledgement e-mail may sometimes not be delivered due to network congestion.
Log on to the official website https://ghconline.gov.in and click on "Online Application for the post of Stenographer Grade-II in the District Courts of Assam".
Upload clear scanned copies of the required testimonials/certificates listed above.
Pay the applicable application fee online.
Submit the application before the last date, 30 July 2026, 05:00 PM.

Note: Applications made in any mode other than the prescribed online process shall be summarily rejected without any communication. For technical assistance regarding submission of online application forms, candidates may email [email protected], mentioning the name of the post, Registration Code (if any), applicant's name, and father's name, with a copy also sent to [email protected].

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: The Gauhati High Court, which covers the states of Assam, Nagaland, Mizoram, and Arunachal Pradesh, is recruiting for the post of Stenographer Grade-II in the district courts of Assam. Below is a quick overview of the Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026.

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details

rows.pay_scale: Rs. 22,000 - Rs. 97,000 + GP Rs. 9,700/- plus other allowances as per rules

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must be citizens of India as defined under Article 5 and 6 of the Constitution of India, and must fulfil the following conditions to be eligible for the Stenographer Grade-II post.

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Category-wise age limits for the post, as on the last date of receipt of applications, are as follows:

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: The selected candidates for the Stenographer Grade-II post will draw a pay scale of Rs. 22,000 - Rs. 97,000 plus Grade Pay of Rs. 9,700/-, along with other allowances applicable as per rules.

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee for the Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 is as follows: Note: Fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances, and it will also not be held in reserve for any other examination or selection. Candidates are advised to apply online well before the last date to avoid heavy load on the internet or website.

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: The selection process for the Stenographer Grade-II post consists of three stages: Stenography Test, Written Test, and Viva-voce. Candidates equal to 10 times the number of vacancies (1:10 ratio), who have qualified in the stenography test by securing a minimum of 30 marks, shall be called for the written test. The written test will consist of objective type (OMR based) multiple choice questions. English Language Proficiency: 50 marks Official Language of the State of Assam (Assamese): 20 marks Total: 70 marks, duration 1½ hours Both English and Assamese language segments are of qualifying nature, and candidates must secure a minimum of 40% marks in each segment to qualify. Candidates qualifying in the written test shall be called in the ratio of 1:3, in order of merit in the Stenography Test, for the Viva-voce (10 marks). The final merit position will be determined on the basis of the total marks obtained in the Stenography Test and Viva-voce. Tie-Breaking Rule: In case of candidates obtaining equal marks (in the Stenography Test and Viva-voce), the one who obtains more marks in the Stenography Test will be given preference. Where the marks obtained in the Stenography Test are also the same, the candidate senior in age will be given preference. The Gauhati High Court reserves the right to fix/alter the cut-off marks in the Written Test and Stenography Test.

rows.description: Speed Test in shorthand at a speed of 100 words per minute (700 words)
Time given to candidates for testing the computer
Time for transcription of the dictated portion in computer

content_sections.heading: Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026 Required Documents
content_sections.text: Candidates need to upload clear scanned copies of the following testimonials/certificates at the time of submission of the online application: Documents relating to age proof (Class X admit card/Birth certificate) Documents relating to educational qualification (Marksheet/Pass certificate) Diploma in Stenography Certificate relating to reservation category (if applicable) Certificate relating to disability (if applicable) No Objection Certificate from the present employer (only for candidates already in Government Service)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Before applying online, candidates must possess a valid e-mail ID and mobile number, which are mandatory for registration. Candidates are requested to note down the Registration Code, as the acknowledgement e-mail may sometimes not be delivered due to network congestion. Log on to the official website https://ghconline.gov.in and click on "Online Application for the post of Stenographer Grade-II in the District Courts of Assam". Upload clear scanned copies of the required testimonials/certificates listed above. Pay the applicable application fee online. Submit the application before the last date, 30 July 2026, 05:00 PM. Note: Applications made in any mode other than the prescribed online process shall be summarily rejected without any communication. For technical assistance regarding submission of online application forms, candidates may email [email protected] , mentioning the name of the post, Registration Code (if any), applicant's name, and father's name, with a copy also sent to [email protected] .

faq.question: Q1. What is the Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by the Gauhati High Court to fill 35 vacancies for the post of Stenographer Grade-II in the district courts of Assam.

faq.question: Q2. When can I apply for the Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II post?
faq.answer: Online applications start from 10 July 2026, 12:00 PM, and the last date for submission is 30 July 2026, 05:00 PM. The last date for fee payment is 05 August 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the pay scale for Stenographer Grade-II?
faq.answer: The pay scale is Rs. 22,000 – Rs. 97,000 plus Grade Pay of Rs. 9,700/-, along with other allowances as per rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age is 18 years for all categories. The maximum age is 40 years for Unreserved, 43 years for OBC/MOBC, 45 years for SC and ST(P)/ST(H), and 50 years for PWD candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Gauhati High Court Stenographer post?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for Unreserved and OBC/MOBC candidates, Rs. 250/- for ST(P)/ST(H) candidates, and Nil for PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for Stenographer Grade-II?
faq.answer: The selection process has three stages: a Stenography Test (100 marks), a Written Test (70 marks) covering English and Assamese language proficiency, and a Viva-voce (10 marks).

faq.question: Q7. Is knowledge of Assamese mandatory for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have adequate knowledge of Assamese, the official language of the State of Assam, and must also qualify the Assamese language segment in the written test.

faq.question: Q8. How do I apply for the Gauhati High Court Stenographer Grade-II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official website https://ghconline.gov.in by clicking on the link for "Online Application for the post of Stenographer Grade-II in the District Courts of Assam" and uploading the required documents.
